rulings.Case Title: RONALD HEVENER VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF EXPERT WITNESS
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, November 9, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Sacramento Stucco Co.¿s motion to compel in-person deposition of Dr. Donald Breyer: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:15am. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY PETERSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Turner Construction Company To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, November 9, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Turner Construction Company to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents at deposition is granted. The court is not imposing any limits. Plaintiffs¿ request for sanctions is denied because defendant acted with substantial justification. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:15am. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY PETERSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion For Order Of Protection To Limit Deposition Notice Of Turner'S Custodian Of Records And Person Most Qualified
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, November 9, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Turner Construction Company¿s motion for protection to limit the deposition notice of Turner¿s custodian of records and person most qualified is denied. Defendant failed to demonstrate good cause to limit the deposition as required by C.C.P. 2025.420. Plaintiffs¿ request for sanctions is denied because defendant acted with substantial justification. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:15am. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY PETERSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, November 9, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel Mills College to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents at deposition pursuant to subpoena is granted. Plaintiffs¿ request for sanctions is granted because Mills College did not act with substantial justification. Sanctions are imposed in the amount of $1261. Mills College¿s request for sanctions is denied. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:15am. = (503/TLJ)
